name: domain-explorer
description: Metadata-driven explorer for industry verticals, subdomains, KPIs, and integration patterns.

scripts.dbt:build: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt deps && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt run --select payments+
scripts.dbt:test: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt test --select payments+
scripts.dbt:build:payments: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt deps && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt run --select payments+
scripts.dbt:build:p_and_c_claims: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt deps && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt run --select p_and_c_claims+
scripts.dbt:build:merchandising: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt deps && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt run --select merchandising+
scripts.dbt:build:demand_planning: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt deps && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt run --select demand_planning+
scripts.dbt:build:hotel_revenue_management: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt deps && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt run --select hotel_revenue_management+
scripts.dbt:build:all: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt deps && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt run --select payments+ p_and_c_claims+ merchandising+ demand_planning+ hotel_revenue_management+
scripts.dbt:test:p_and_c_claims: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt test --select p_and_c_claims+
scripts.dbt:test:merchandising: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt test --select merchandising+
scripts.dbt:test:demand_planning: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt test --select demand_planning+
scripts.dbt:test:hotel_revenue_management: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt test --select hotel_revenue_management+
scripts.dbt:test:all: cd modeling/dbt && DBT_PROFILES_DIR=. dbt test --select payments+ p_and_c_claims+ merchandising+ demand_planning+ hotel_revenue_management+
